flags.description: Use the VSO CSI Driver (Requires Vault Enterprise)
flags.name: --csi

flags.description: Simulate the execution without changing state
flags.name: --dry-run

flags.description: Use the advanced jwt-k8s OIDC architecture (experimental)
flags.name: --jwt

flags.description: KinD node image used when creating the cluster (default "kindest/node:v1.31.1")
flags.name: --kind-node-image string

flags.description: Helm chart version for hashicorp/vault-secrets-operator (empty uses latest)
flags.name: --vso-chart-version string

flags.description: Destroy KinD and clean up Vault configurations
flags.name: -d, --disable

flags.description: Deploy KinD and configure Vault Secrets Operator
flags.name: -e, --enable

flags.description: Force a clean redeployment of the cluster
flags.name: -f, --force
